reason: One P0 defect: world-list.txt lists 27 worlds while PLAN.md describes 29. This operational mismatch will cause authoring automation to use the wrong world structure. Trivially fixable but blocking.
p0Defects: world-list.txt does not match PLAN.md: still has combined 'FinsuppAndMatrices' (should be separate 'Finsupp' and 'Matrices') and is missing 'PsetCounting'
p2Defects: W12 L05 references descFactorial without introducing it in any world's inventory
ℕ not Fintype counterexample still missing from W11
List→Multiset→Finset supported practice compressed into W10 with no retrieval outside that world
ring/ring_nf not introduced despite being listed as supporting LEAN in coverage map
recommendations: Update world-list.txt to match PLAN.md: replace 'FinsuppAndMatrices' with separate 'Finsupp' and 'Matrices' entries, add 'PsetCounting' between 'CountingTechniques' and 'Finale'
Either add Nat.descFactorial to W12 inventory or reword W12 L05 to avoid referencing an untaught concept
Add brief 'ℕ has no Fintype instance' warning in W11 intro text
Add a level in W14 that connects Finset.sum to the Multiset layer for abstraction-ladder retrieval outside W10
Consider introducing ring/ring_nf in W15 alongside calc
notes: The plan is very close to passing. All round 1 P0 and P1 defects are resolved in PLAN.md. Coverage closure is strong (26/32 strong, 6 partial, 0 weak/illusory). Proof-move map tracks 8 high-value moves with full 5-stage cycles. The only blocker is the world-list.txt file not reflecting the plan's world structure. After fixing that, the P2 items are worth addressing but not blocking.
